commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=886d9760a3e84397a26066c36274a4370c86fa71)
commands.review_summary:
The branch maps cached Telegram forum topic names into thread-label context, changes forum-topic conversation labels to prefer the topic name, and extends one Telegram forum-topic context test.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +2. Total +10 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main obtains and exposes `TopicName`, while the visible session display path consumes `ThreadLabel`/`displayName`; I did not run a live Telegram forum reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor follow-up is needed for the code findings and real-behavior proof; missing external proof makes this a human-only merge blocker rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(telegram): surface forum topic names as thread labels
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #7406. Telegram forum topic names were already learned from Telegram topic metadata and exposed as `TopicName`, but the generic session/conversation labels still fell back to the parent group label or group id. Topic-scoped sessions could therefore appear as the same group instead of the actual forum topic name.

## Why This Change Was Made

When a forum topic name is known, this change passes that name through the generic channel context as both the conversation label and the thread label. Routing remains unchanged: the session key, conversation id, and `message_thread_id` still carry the chat/topic identifiers, and non-forum groups or unknown topic names keep the previous label fallback.

## User Impact

Telegram forum topic sessions now show the learned topic name, such as `Deployments`, in session and thread-label surfaces instead of only showing the parent group label/id. This makes topic-scoped Telegram conversations easier to identify without changing delivery behavior.

## Evidence

Head: `886d9760a3e84397a26066c36274a4370c86fa71`

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-threads.test.ts`
- `pnpm oxfmt --check extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.session.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-threads.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
target.author: lin-hongkuan
